memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, void *data, off_t off, size_t len)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read

briefdescription.para: Read data from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Buffer to store the read data. Must be at least len bytes.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes. Must be less than the cell size.
Number of bytes to read. off + len must not exceed the cell size.

simplesect.para: Available only when the following Kconfig option is enabled: CONFIG_NVMEM.

parameterdescription.para: Invalid offset or length arguments.
The controller device is not ready.
No runtime device API available.

simplesect.para: The result of the underlying device API call.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, const void *data, off_t off, size_t len)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write

briefdescription.para: Write data to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to. Must not be read-only.
Buffer containing data to write. Must be at least len bytes.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes. Must be less than the cell size.
Number of bytes to write. off + len must not exceed the cell size.

simplesect.para: Available only when the following Kconfig option is enabled: CONFIG_NVMEM.

parameterdescription.para: Invalid offset or length arguments.
Writing to a read-only NVMEM Cell.
The controller device is not ready.
No runtime device API available.

simplesect.para: The result of the underlying device API call.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_is_ready

briefdescription.para: Check if an NVMEM cell is ready.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to check. May be NULL.

simplesect.para: True if the NVMEM cell is ready for use and false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_is_read_only

briefdescription.para: Check if an NVMEM cell is read-only.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to check. Can't be NULL.

simplesect.para: True if the NVMEM cell is read-only and false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint16_t *val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read_le16

briefdescription.para: Read a little-endian 16-bit value from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Pointer to store the host-endian result.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint16_t *val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read_be16

briefdescription.para: Read a big-endian 16-bit value from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Pointer to store the host-endian result.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint32_t *val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read_le32

briefdescription.para: Read a little-endian 32-bit value from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Pointer to store the host-endian result.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint32_t *val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read_be32

briefdescription.para: Read a big-endian 32-bit value from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Pointer to store the host-endian result.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint64_t *val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read_le48

briefdescription.para: Read a little-endian 48-bit value from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Pointer to store the host-endian result.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint64_t *val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read_be48

briefdescription.para: Read a big-endian 48-bit value from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Pointer to store the host-endian result.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint64_t *val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read_le64

briefdescription.para: Read a little-endian 64-bit value from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Pointer to store the host-endian result.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint64_t *val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_read_be64

briefdescription.para: Read a big-endian 64-bit value from an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to read from.
Pointer to store the host-endian result.
Offset within the cell to start reading from, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint16_t val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write_le16

briefdescription.para: Write a little-endian 16-bit value to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to.
Host-endian value to write.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint16_t val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write_be16

briefdescription.para: Write a big-endian 16-bit value to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to.
Host-endian value to write.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint32_t val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write_le32

briefdescription.para: Write a little-endian 32-bit value to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to.
Host-endian value to write.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint32_t val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write_be32

briefdescription.para: Write a big-endian 32-bit value to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to.
Host-endian value to write.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint64_t val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write_le48

briefdescription.para: Write a little-endian 48-bit value to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to.
Host-endian value to write.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint64_t val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write_be48

briefdescription.para: Write a big-endian 48-bit value to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to.
Host-endian value to write.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint64_t val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write_le64

briefdescription.para: Write a little-endian 64-bit value to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to.
Host-endian value to write.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct nvmem_cell *cell, uint64_t val, off_t off)
memberdef.name: nvmem_cell_write_be64

briefdescription.para: Write a big-endian 64-bit value to an NVMEM cell.

parameterdescription.para: NVMEM cell to write to.
Host-endian value to write.
Offset within the cell to start writing to, in bytes.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or a negative error code.

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell.

detaileddescription.para: This returns a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell given a devicetree node identifier.

This is a helper macro for other NVMEM_CELL_GET macros to initialize the nvmem_cell struct.
Example devicetree fragment:

parameterdescription.para: Node identifier for an NVMEM cell.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell by name.

detaileddescription.para: This returns a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell given a devicetree node identifier and a name.

parameterdescription.para: Node identifier for a node with an nvmem-cells property.
Lowercase-and-underscores name of an nvmem-cells element as defined by the node's nvmem-cell-names property.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell for the property.

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell from a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance by name.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Lowercase-and-underscores name of an nvmem-cells element as defined by the node's nvmem-cell-names property.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell for the property.

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell by name, with a fallback.

detaileddescription.para: If the devicetree node identifier 'node_id' refers to a node with a property 'nvmem-cells', this expands to NVMEM_CELL_GET_BY_NAME(node_id, name). The default_value parameter is not expanded in this case. Otherwise, this expands to default_value.

parameterdescription.para: Node identifier for a node that may have an nvmem-cells property.
Lowercase-and-underscores name of an nvmem-cells element as defined by the node's nvmem-cell-names property.
Fallback value to expand to.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell from a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance by name, with a fallback.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Lowercase-and-underscores name of an nvmem-cells element as defined by the node's nvmem-cell-names property.
Fallback value to expand to.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell by index.

detaileddescription.para: This returns a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell given a devicetree node identifier and an index.

parameterdescription.para: Node identifier for a node with an nvmem-cells property.
Logical index into 'nvmem-cells' property.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell for the property.

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell from a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance by index.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Logical index into 'nvmem-cells' property.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell for the property.

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell by index, with a fallback.

detaileddescription.para: If the devicetree node identifier 'node_id' refers to a node with a property 'nvmem-cells', this expands to NVMEM_CELL_GET_BY_IDX(node_id, idx). The default_value parameter is not expanded in this case. Otherwise, this expands to default_value.

parameterdescription.para: Node identifier for a node that may have an nvmem-cells property.
Logical index into 'nvmem-cells' property.
Fallback value to expand to.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Get a static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell from a DT_DRV_COMPAT instance by index, with a fallback.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT instance number.
Logical index into 'nvmem-cells' property.
Fallback value to expand to.

simplesect.para: Static initializer for a struct nvmem_cell for the property, or default_value if the node or property do not exist.

briefdescription.para: Non-volatile memory cells.
